title: Depth of Shinji and Reis relationship
display_title: Depth of Shinji and Reis relationship
wikitext:
[]: Depth of Shinji and Rei's relationship             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Thu Aug 28, 2008 3:40 pm LoganPayne wrote: Anyone who believes R/S usually doesn't have a grasp of the characters.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Aug 28, 2008 6:11 pm The Oedipus angle likely has no bearing, since up until the very end they both either don't know or don't care.. Shinji doesn't know who she's a clone of until he finally sees his mom at the end of EOE. If Rei knows of her relationship with Shinji she never directly lets on, and if so it still likely doesn't bother her. Shinji definately feels something towards Rei and vice versa. Just what that soemthing is is quite up to the audience.

[]: Re: Depth of Shinji and Rei's relationship             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Aug 28, 2008 8:27 pm Gamer_2k4 wrote: Is there anything in the show or movie that would indicate that such a pairing isn't likely or possible?

[]: Re: Depth of Shinji and Rei's relationship             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Aug 28, 2008 9:50 pm True, by the time the movie rolls around things are so fucked that nobody in the series has the slightest chance to be happy. Any sincere pairing in NGE requires either a diversion fairly early or plenty of time after 3I to sort out issues.

[]:             Quote Post by swamp147 » Thu Aug 28, 2008 10:55 pm By the final scene of EoE, does Shinji know that Rei is a clone of Yui? If so, when does he find out?

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Thu Aug 28, 2008 10:58 pm ^ Well, he sees his mom in Unit 01 before it departs for good. So if he doesn't realize then that his mommy looks like that girl he groped, he is probably isn't going to realize since he just spent half the movie with GNR.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Aug 29, 2008 1:22 am Rei has much better chemistry with Shinji than Asuka by LEAGUES.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Aug 29, 2008 1:33 am She did before she turned into the freakgirl with the 4 billion year old alien soul. That kinda killed it.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Fri Aug 29, 2008 1:40 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: She did before she turned into the freakgirl with the 4 billion year old alien soul. That kinda killed it.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Aug 29, 2008 1:49 am For now. The only thing keeping other people from returning is their will to live. Once they find it they will return which may or may not be a good thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Fri Aug 29, 2008 1:52 am But then everything is hypothetical and you're not justified in saying ANYTHING about peoples' relationships, assuming that their changes are as drastic as Shinji's. And if they only have minor mental/social changes, then it's pretty much the same as before, right? It boils down to either "It's the same" or "I don't know," and neither stance is exactly solid debating ground.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Aug 29, 2008 1:55 am I'd hope they'd have a better outlook on life since they want to be there. But that is the point, you never know. That's the beauty and nightmare of the whole thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion__x » Fri Aug 29, 2008 2:17 am YES, finally a thread like this lol. I'm a huge fan of S/R. It would definitely work better than S/A, hands down. And I'm still not entirely convinced it's incest. It's complicated.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Fri Aug 29, 2008 10:39 am But back on topic. Would Rei and Shinji, if left to their own devices, make a good couple? Do their personalities allow for this? Is there anything in the show that strongly (or even subtly) alludes to this as a possibility? Does Rei like Shinji like that? Does Shinji like Rei like that? And if they don't now, could it happen in the future (disregarding 3I which, as we know, kind of breaks everything)?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Aug 29, 2008 2:00 pm I'm pretty sure that any pairing of Shinji and Rei would have to take place prior to Third Impact, simply because after 3I everything's screwed up and all bets are off. Besides, pairings aren't meant to take place in the post-3I world anyway. (You know, because of the little thing where there's NO PEOPLE.) And this is probably off topic, but if Shinji x Asuka only works after 3I, then what's the point? Really, why does it matter that they'd be perfect for each other then? They're the only two people in the world! I mean, come on, if it takes a freaking apocalypse for two people to realize that they love each other, then it probably wasn't meant to be, you know?

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Fri Aug 29, 2008 3:06 pm AuraTwilight wrote: And now you crossed the line and made me hate you for calling her an Otaku's dream. Thanks a lot.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Fri Aug 29, 2008 4:36 pm Eric Blair wrote: 1. Shinji and Asuka cannot be rooming together because that is where most of the sexual attraction between them both stems from

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Aug 29, 2008 4:40 pm Gamer, have you seen the director's cut of ep. 22? Kind of puts a wrench in your hypothesis thar.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Aug 29, 2008 4:49 pm Poor Asuka Shinji's a dick.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Fri Aug 29, 2008 5:12 pm Gamer_2k4 wrote: Sexual attraction?
